Video.summary: Chef Marcela Valladolid gives Matthew a hands-on lesson in crafting the perfect taco and salsa.
Video.title: Marcela Valladolid: A Chef's Kitchen on the Coast

Video.summary: Chef and restaurateur Melba Wilson schools Matthew on the art of her legendary shrimp and grits.
Video.title: Melba Wilson: A Harlem Icon

Video.summary: Jillian dives into an off-grid dream when she visits a one-of-a-kind Quonset hut in Joshua Tree.
Video.title: Off-Grid Living: The Creative Space

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch takes on the science of transforming spaces.
Video.title: The Science Behind Kitchens & Bedrooms

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch transforms everything from small rooms to outdoor spaces.
Video.title: The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living

Video.summary: Jillian visits two homeowners who have taken containers—and creativity—to extraordinary new heights.
Video.title: Container Homes: All Shapes and Sizes

Container Homes: All Shapes and Sizes

It’s a Mood: Cara Woodhouse’s Noyack Cottage

Video.summary: Jillian learns how history inspires the future, touring boundary-pushing homes with a modern twist.
Video.title: Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels

Image.alt: Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels
Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels

Video.summary: Jillian explores some of the most whimsical homes in Southern California.
Video.title: Once Upon a Time: Fairy Tale Homes

Video.summary: Jillian dives into community living, exploring how we create spaces that bring us closer together.

From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone

Video.summary: Matthew meets trailblazers Matthew McIvor of Proudly Serving and the King of Babka, Shimi Aaron.
Video.title: Burgers and Babka: Viral Sensations

Video.summary: Matthew meets Ethiopian-born Chef Fariyal Abdullahi and gets a hands-on lesson in creating Doro Wat.
Video.title: Fariyal Abdullahi: From Ethiopia to the Met Gala

Video.summary: Jillian experiences a kaleidoscope of color exploring the Mosaic Tile House and the Rainbow House.
Video.title: Living in Art: Kaleidoscopic Homes

Video.summary: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.
Video.title: Creating a Family Homestead

Video.summary: Anne is an entrepreneur whose home office headquarters is having an identity crisis.
Video.title: Office

Video.summary: Jordan and Jeff crave an oasis that completely reimagines what a home gym can be.
Video.title: Home Gym Sanctuary

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: Building & Tending Your Garden

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: A Bountiful Harvest

Video.summary: Nate and Emily have spent months remodeling, but the kitchen has been last on their list.
Video.title: Modern Mindful Kitchen

Video.summary: Hosts Tyler and Rachel kick off the competition by introducing the four teams and assigning their first challenge.
Video.title: Meet the Neighbors

Video.summary: The teams race through the local nursery to find the perfect plants to bring life to their budding backyard designs.
Video.title: Place It & Plant It

Video.summary: Tyler and Rachel challenge the teams to select items to upcycle and repurpose in their backyard designs.
Video.title: Ultimate Upcycles

Video.summary: The stakes are high as the teams strap on their toolbelts and plan their backyards builds.
Video.title: Backyard Builds

Video.summary: The judges challenge the remaining teams to craft and present a unique menu for a backyard party.
Video.title: Mastering the Menu

Video.summary: The remaining two teams prepare their winning menus for the final challenge.
Video.title: Best on the Block

Video.summary: Anne-Marie Barton invites you through the gate to this stately, traditional yet modern home.
Video.title: Historical Modern Heirloom Estate

Video.summary: Kayla and Ryan have a newborn and a toddler and need both functionality and style in their space.
Video.title: Kayla & Ryan’s Toddler To-Do List

Video.summary: Eduardo and Gabriela's ‘little’ home projects have piled up and they’re ready for Drew’s help.
Video.title: Eduardo & Gabriela’s Guest Retreat

Video.summary: Hollie’s bland master bedroom lacks any sense of tranquility.
Video.title: Master Bedroom Retreat

Video.summary: Margot and Josh spent years perfecting every room in the house but overlooked their bedroom.
Video.title: Margot & Josh’s Teal Transformation

Video.summary: Matthew visits Carnie Wilson's Los Angeles home to whip up her Fall-to-Your-Knees Mac and Cheese.
Video.title: Carnie Wilson: Rock Royalty's Infamous Mac and Cheese

Video.summary: Julie Couch breaks down the basic equations for taking the stress out of design.
Video.title: The Laws of Lighting & Color

Video.summary: Andrea Schumacher invites you into her Colorado home, which tells the story of her life and travels.
Video.title: Artful & Eclectic Designer Dwelling

Video.summary: Designer Jennifer Farrell invites you to experience Calibu Vineyard, her home nestled in the Califronia hills.
Video.title: Montauk-Inspired Calibu Vineyard
